propositions: Remove the emit_legacy_signature_mirror field and its validator from CompactConfig schema and parser.
Hardcode never-emit behavior in _snapshot_strip_keys so 'signature' is always dropped and the mirror branch is deleted.
Preserve the in-memory signature mirror path: process_signature re-derivation and most_recent_attestation fallback remain unchanged.
Update docs/migrations.md and release notes to record the legacy signature-mirror retirement and removal of the rollback lever.
Assert the readiness gate holds that no pre-attestations reader shares this store, since removal is a one-way door.
New snapshots must never persist the legacy signature mirror after this change.
